meta.title: Sinora — Travel to China, made simple
meta.description: The platform that prepares, organises and supports your trip to China: tailored itineraries, paperwork, trains, interactive maps and local tips.

hero.badge: Before, during and after the trip
hero.title: Your trip to China,
hero.subtitle: Tailored itineraries, paperwork made clear, the rail network at your fingertips. Everything you need to leave with peace of mind.

how.title: A companion for every stage
how.subtitle: From the first idea to coming home, Sinora stays by your side.

steps.title: Prepare
steps.text: Visa, eSIM, essential apps, mobile payments: paperwork becomes a clear checklist.

steps.title: Travel
steps.text: Itineraries, trains, interactive maps and local tips available offline, wherever you are.

steps.title: Keep
steps.text: Your trips, favourites and notes gathered in a personal space, ready for next time.

features.title: Everything in one place
features.subtitle: The essential tools for a successful trip to China.

items.title: Trip generator
items.text: A full itinerary built from your budget, your wishes and your pace.

items.title: Pre-departure prep
items.text: Visa, customs, health, internet: every formality explained simply.

items.title: Rail network
items.text: High-speed trains, classes, stations and connections, all decoded.

items.title: Interactive maps
items.text: Weather, safety, transport and culture, visualised city by city.

items.title: City guides
items.text: 17 detailed destinations: districts, food, tourist traps to avoid.

items.title: Halal travel
items.text: Restaurants, mosques and adapted itineraries, with total peace of mind.

profiles.title: Built around how you travel
profiles.subtitle: Sinora tailors its recommendations to your profile.

cities.title: Destinations to explore
cities.subtitle: Electric megacities, listed landscapes and imperial towns.

cta.title: Ready to go?
cta.subtitle: Build your itinerary in a few minutes.

meta.title: Destinations in China — Sinora
meta.description: Explore the cities of China: overview, best seasons, recommended length of stay and must-sees.

destinations.title: All destinations
destinations.subtitle: Twelve cities to shape your trip, from the frozen north to the edges of the Silk Road.
